title: [Create-TACZ]mecharmorer
description: Deleted the synthesis based on the original TACZ formula. Now, it can be synthesized using mechanical-powered synthesizers. Also supported is the use of mobile ammunition pouches, in conjunction with refined processing techniques.
body:
In this world of blocks and gears, the manufacturing of weapons should not be merely a simple assembly of components on a workbench. Let mechanical arms create each gun for you, let steam and gears create the sounds of the industrial era. As mechanical arms lift slowly, gears turn into motion, and metal parts move along the production line in an orderly manner—this is the romance of weapon manufacturing. It’s no longer just a simple arrangement of materials, but an artistic performance of the industrial age.
The creation of each gun is accompanied by the sound of gears grinding together, the precise movements of robotic arms, and the crisp sounds of bullet casings colliding together.
Dependency modules
Create (Mechanical power) – Provide the necessary infrastructure for automated manufacturing
TACZ (Gunmod) – Offers a rich collection of weapons.
47 gun recipes – from pistols to heavy machine guns, all series of mechanical-powered synthesizers
98 different accessory formulas – sights, grips, muzzle devices… Every component is carefully crafted with great precision.
11 new items available: brass bullet casings, iron bullet casings. Every detail reflects an industrial-style design.
You can add the mobile ordnance officer gun pack to make the game more smooth and enjoyable. Link: https://afdian.com/a/koeiTaCZ. Author of the video: Rhodes_koei.

中文摘要 

在方块与齿轮的世界里，武器的制造不应该只是简单的工作台合成。让机械动力臂为你打造每一把枪，让蒸汽与齿轮奏响工业时代的乐章。当机械臂缓缓抬起，齿轮开始转动，金属零件在流水线上有序移动一一这就是武器制造的浪漫。不
再是简单的材料排列，而是一场工业时代的艺术表演。
依赖模组
每一把枪的诞生，都伴随着:齿轮的轰鸣声机械臂的精准移动弹壳碰撞的清脆声响
Create(机械动力)- 提供自动化制造的基础设施
TACZ(枪械模组)- 提供丰富的武器库
KubeJS- 让一切成为可能的粘合剂
47把枪械配方-从手枪到重机枪，全系列机械动力合成
98种配件配方- 瞄具、握把、枪口装置，每一个部件都精雕细琢
11种新增物品-黄铜弹壳、铁制弹壳，每一个细节都体现工业风格
可以漆加机动军械师枪包游玩更流畅链按https://afdian. com/a/koeiTaCZ B站作者Rhodes_koei
